testcase.name: createStory_validPayload_returns201
testcase.system-out: [Bootstrap] ensureFirstUser: email=apitestuser@skillbarter.com baseUrl=https://skillbarter-ropl.onrender.com [Bootstrap] loginAndStore: POST /api/auth/login (apitestuser@skillbarter.com) -> 200 [Bootstrap] lookupUserIdByEmail: GET /api/users -> 200 [Bootstrap] ensureFirstUser: token=SET userId=57 [Bootstrap] ensureSecondUser: email=apitestuser2@skillbarter.com [Bootstrap] loginAndStore: POST /api/auth/login (apitestuser2@skillbarter.com) -> 200 [Bootstrap] lookupUserIdByEmail: GET /api/users -> 200 [Bootstrap] ensureSecondUser: token=SET userId=59 Request method: POST Request URI: https://skillbarter-ropl.onrender.com/api/stories
